discipline: Pulled-forward slices satisfy Security Spine/Alpha only and do not close full later milestones.

milestones.title: Recovery, baseline, and governance
milestones.estimate_range: To be calibrated before entry; no calendar promise is made at Stage 1.
milestones.deliverables_and_non_goals: Normative in Revision 1.1 Milestone 0; unlisted integration claims remain OPEN.
milestones.acceptance_criteria: Revision 1.1 Milestone 0 exit gate plus affected stable release blockers.
milestones.required_evidence: Bootstrap evidence until v8 evidence custody is independently accepted; then rerun through v8.
milestones.rollback_recovery: Revert authority to the last accepted immutable tag and retain the failed attempt as evidence.
